name: Gleam Tiny Home - 16x48 Modern ADU & Backyard Living Space | DIY Tiny House Plan
open_features: 16x48 Spacious Tiny Home with Sloped Roof
Modern minimalist architecture built for larger ADU applications, rental opportunities, or full-time compact living.
Generous proportions allow for open-concept living areas, defined sleeping zones, full kitchens, bathrooms, and storage solutions.
Clean lines, standard framing methods, and practical dimensions make Gleam approachable for both experienced builders and ambitious DIYers.
Strategically placed doors and windows maximize daylight, ventilation, and functionality while maintaining privacy.
description_summary: Kickstart your next big backyard upgrade with the Gleam Tiny Home - a spacious 16x48 modern living and working retreat designed for flexibility, comfort, and clean architectural simplicity. Showcasing a streamlined single-slope roof, warm horizontal siding, and bold contemporary lines, Gleam delivers standout curb appeal with expansive interior potential. With 768 square feet of thoughtfully designed space, this layout is ideal for those who want more room to live, work, host, or create - wit...
